name: dropdown-menu
description: Controlled/uncontrolled headless menu-button dropdown (v-next). A trigger + a floating role='menu' panel built on the native HTML popover API + CSS Anchor Positioning. UNCONTROLLED by default: the browser owns open/close via popovertarget (zero JS round-trip, top-layer render, light-dismiss, Tab exits). CONTROLLED opt-in: pass open={wire.open()} to bind panel presence to a Wire field. Keyboard navigation (Arrow/Home/End/Esc/Tab/typeahead) via the shared collection-nav.enhancer.ts in roving-tabindex mode. Focus returns to trigger on close via popover-anchor.enhancer.ts. Items are real <a href> (navigation) or <button> (action), role=menuitem/menuitemcheckbox/menuitemradio. Groups, labels, separator, submenu, shortcut composed from sub-partials. No Lit island, CSP-clean, zero inline script.
docs: Copies the dropdown-menu family to your JTE root. UNCONTROLLED (default): pass id + trigger + content; the browser toggles the panel. CONTROLLED: also pass open={wire.open()} to bind to a Wire field; expose a 'close' action on the Wire component (the popover-anchor enhancer calls it on light-dismiss). Install collection-nav.enhancer.ts + popover-anchor.enhancer.ts for keyboard nav and focus return. Compose content from: @template.lievit.dropdown-menu.item (give href for navigation, formId/formAction for form POST, wireClick+wireArgs for per-row wire action; type=checkbox/radio for checkable items), @template.lievit.dropdown-menu.label, @template.lievit.dropdown-menu.group, @template.lievit.dropdown-menu.separator, @template.lievit.dropdown-menu.shortcut, @template.lievit.dropdown-menu.sub.
